errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Access your k-veritas account to manage tests.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.

register.title: Create account
register.success: Account created. You can sign in now.
register.accept_terms: I agree to the terms of service and privacy policy.

errors.conflict: This email is already in use.
errors.rate_limited: Registration limit reached. Try again later.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.description: We'll send a reset link if the email is registered.
forgot.sent: If the email exists, you'll receive a link shortly.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.success: Password updated. Please sign in again.

mfa_enroll.title: Secure your account with MFA
mfa_enroll.description: Scan the QR with your authenticator app and enter the generated code.
mfa_enroll.instructions: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy or any TOTP app.

mfa_verify.title: Verification code
mfa_verify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa_verify.back_to_login: Sign out and try another account

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Organize your tests by app, environment, or team.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create your first project so the AI can learn your app.

wizard.title: New project
wizard.subtitle: Tell us about the app and key scenarios. The AI uses this to generate tests.

source_type_options.repo_desc: AI reads the source code via public git clone.
source_type_options.zip_desc: Upload a .zip of the code. Works for private repos or any provider.
source_type_options.url_desc: Playwright crawler explores the running app.

step1.zip_file_hint: Download the ZIP of your repo (GitHub: Code > Download ZIP). Limit: 100 MB.
step1.repo_url_hint: Accepts https://github.com/owner/repo, git@github.com:owner/repo and the shorthand owner/repo.
step1.business_context_placeholder: Describe in free text the use case and business rules QA wants to cover. You can edit this later in the project settings.
step1.business_context_hint: This text is sent together with the code to the AI, so it can draft scenarios more aligned with your business.
step1.url_hint: Use staging or preview. Avoid production when testing destructive flows.
step1.target_url_repo_hint: Where the generated Playwright tests will run. You can leave blank and fill in Settings before executing.
step1.auth_hint: If yes, provide test credentials so the crawler can authenticate before exploring.
step1.auth_hint_repo: If yes, provide test credentials. Generated Playwright specs will use them to authenticate before running.
step1.credentials_note: Credentials are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and used only by the crawler.
step1.target_locale_hint: The AI will write the summary, features and scenarios in this language regardless of the app's URL structure.

step2.description_placeholder: An e-commerce for natural products with cart, Stripe checkout, customer area...
step2.description_hint: A few sentences explaining what the app does.
step2.scenarios_placeholder:
Add product to cart
Checkout with approved card
Empty cart shows message
step2.scenarios_hint: One scenario per line. At least 1, up to 50.

wizard.next_step_hint: We're crawling your app now. You'll add test scenarios next, after seeing the site map.

errors.rate_limited: Creation limit reached. Try again later.
errors.only_github: Only GitHub repositories are supported for now.
errors.zip_required: Please select the .zip file before creating the project.
errors.zip_upload: Project created, but ZIP upload failed. You can retry in Settings.

setup.heading: Test variables
setup.description: Values injected into the Playwright process when you run tests. Encrypted at rest.
setup.pending_hint: {count} variable(s) detected in tests with no value set. Fill before running, else tests fail with 'undefined'.

primary_hint.E2E_USER: email / login of the test environment

setup.empty_others: No additional variables detected or registered.
setup.detected_tooltip: Variable used in at least one generated .spec.ts

errors.duplicate_name: A variable with this name already exists.

execution.empty: No scenarios with a generated test yet. Go back to "Scripts" and generate at least one test to run here.
execution.enqueued: Execution queued. Runner will pick it up shortly.
execution.evidence_empty: This run has no captured evidence.
execution.evidence_video_hint: Full browser recording during the test. Use the controls to navigate frame by frame.
execution.evidence_screenshot_alt: Browser screenshot at the end of the test
execution.evidence_screenshot_hint: Image taken at the end of the test. Click to zoom.
execution.evidence_trace_hint: Full Playwright trace with DOM, network, and screenshots per action. Open with 'npx playwright show-trace file.zip'.

errors.no_generated_test: Generate this scenario's test before running.

tests.heading: Generate Playwright tests
tests.subheading: {reviewed}/{total} reviewed scenarios ready to become code
tests.empty_hint: Mark at least one scenario as reviewed in the AI Analysis tab before generating tests.
tests.confirm_delete: Delete this run and all generated files? This cannot be undone.

progress.waiting_hint: Large or cloud-hosted models can take 30–90s to warm up.

empty.description: No tests generated yet. Click "Generate tests" above once you have reviewed scenarios.

errors.no_reviewed: Mark at least one scenario as reviewed before generating.
errors.rate_limited: Wait a moment before generating again.

model_picker.heading: Model for this run
model_picker.default_hint: Uses the model saved in AI Settings
model_picker.custom_prompt: Enter the model name ({provider}). Leave empty to use the default.

progress.waiting_hint: Large or cloud-hosted models can take 30–90s to warm up before responding.

empty.title: No analysis yet
empty.description: AI will read the site map and captured elements to suggest features and test scenarios automatically.

errors.rate_limited: Too many analyses started. Wait before trying again.
errors.no_crawl: Run a crawl before analyzing. the AI needs the site map.

editor.empty_pending: All reviewed. Head to "Scripts" to generate Playwright code.
editor.empty_reviewed: No reviewed scenarios yet. Mark scenarios as reviewed in the AI Analysis tab to bring them here.

generate.hint_no_reviewed: Mark at least one scenario as reviewed before generating tests
generate.hint_no_candidates: All reviewed scenarios already have tests. Re-review or add new ones to generate more.
generate.no_reviewed: Mark at least one scenario as reviewed before generating tests.
generate.rate_limited: Wait a moment before generating again.

test.deleted: Test deleted. You can generate again.
test.confirm_delete: Delete the generated test for this scenario? The scenario will become a candidate for regeneration.
test.flow_not_detected: Flow could not be auto-detected. See the raw code below.

errors.feature_no_reviewed_scenarios: Review at least one scenario inside this feature before marking it as reviewed.

confirm.delete_feature: Delete feature "{name}" and all scenarios within it? This cannot be undone.

sheet_scenario.description: A scenario is what an automated test will verify. Be specific about the expected behavior.
sheet_scenario.title_placeholder: E.g.: Search customer by CNPJ with status filter
sheet_scenario.rationale_hint: Why is this worth testing? The business value, not technical details.
sheet_scenario.rationale_placeholder: Validates that CNPJ search finds the customer even with the status filter active.
sheet_scenario.preconditions_hint: System state that must exist before the scenario starts.
sheet_scenario.data_needed_hint: Fixtures and parameters the test will need to prepare.

sheet_feature.description_hint: A feature is a functional grouping. a business capability.
sheet_feature.description_placeholder: One sentence about what the feature delivers.
sheet_feature.paths_hint: App paths that belong to this feature. One per line.

errors.crawl_running: A crawl is already in progress.
errors.rate_limited: Wait a moment before starting another crawl.
Wait a moment before triggering another re-crawl.

errors.invalid_path: Invalid path. Use /something or same-origin URL.
errors.rate_limited: Wait a moment before adding another path.

code.empty_description: AI reads your project's source code and drafts features and test scenarios. You review and approve, then we generate the Playwright tests.
code.source_not_configured_hint: This project has no repository configured. Set one in Settings to run the analysis.
code.planning_business_rule_placeholder: Free-text description of the system's business rule. E.g.: 'Login anti-fraud: show CAPTCHA after 3 failed attempts; use generic messages to avoid user enumeration'.
code.planning_scenarios_placeholder: e.g.: Login with a non-existent email shows a generic message
code.completed_hint: Analysis complete. See the result in the Features/Scenarios tab.
code.completed_banner_subtitle: {tokens} tokens used across {turns} turns. Scenarios are ready for review.
code.completed_with_warning_hint: Ran with warnings. the manifest was imported anyway. See details in the events above.
code.toast_failed: Analysis failed. Check the events for details.

errors.rate_limited: Too many analyses in a short time. Wait a bit.
errors.anthropic_key_missing: Set an Anthropic key in /settings/ai to run code analysis.
errors.source_not_configured: This project has no repository configured.

log.waiting_first_event: waiting for the worker to pick up the job…

map.crawling_description: This may take a few minutes. The page updates automatically.
map.crawler_not_applicable_description: This project uses source-code analysis (GitHub). The Playwright crawler is only available for projects created from a URL. Open the "Code" tab to see the analysis state.
map.empty_description: Check the URL you provided and try re-crawling.

row.no_elements_hint: No elements captured. The SPA likely didn't finish hydrating. try re-crawling.

test_scripts.heading: Scripts
test_scripts.empty_description: Approve features on Structure, refine scenarios on Scenario, then come back here to generate Playwright .spec.ts files.
test_scripts.empty_scenarios: No scenarios in this feature. Add them on the Scenario screen.
test_scripts.pending_tooltip: Job sent to kveritas-codex. Screen refreshes when the test is ready.
test_scripts.pending_hint: kveritas-codex is exploring the code and writing the .spec.ts.

errors.no_tests: No tests generated yet. Generate at least one to download the ZIP.
errors.anthropic_missing: Configure an Anthropic key in /settings/ai (or use OAuth) to generate tests via codex.
errors.rate_limited: Too many generations. Wait a moment.

scenarios.heading: Scenarios per feature
scenarios.empty_description: Approve features on the Structure screen so they appear here and you can refine the test scenarios.
scenarios.empty_scenarios: This feature has no scenarios. Add the first one below.
scenarios.add_scenario_placeholder: e.g.: Wrong password shows a generic message
scenarios.confirm_remove_scenario: Remove this scenario? If there's a generated test, it will be deleted too.

discovery.heading: Context per feature
discovery.empty: No features identified by the analysis yet.
discovery.card_summary_empty: AI didn't write an understanding for this feature.
discovery.field_ai_understanding_hint: How the AI read this feature in the code. Edit if anything is incorrect.
discovery.placeholder_ai_understanding: The AI hasn't written an understanding for this feature yet.
discovery.field_ai_scenarios_readonly_hint: Preview of proposed scenarios. Editing lives on the Scenario screen.
discovery.field_ai_scenarios_empty: AI didn't suggest scenarios for this feature.
discovery.confirm_delete: Delete this feature? This action cannot be undone.

fields.name: Name
fields.target_url_hint: Changing the URL requires a new crawl to reflect the new target.

crawl.section_subtitle: Adjust how deep the crawler follows links.
crawl.max_depth_hint: Seed URL is depth 0; each link followed adds +1. Links beyond this limit are skipped (avoids infinite pagination, dynamic filters and loops).

ai.section_subtitle: Controls the language the AI uses when generating features and scenarios.
ai.target_locale_hint: The summary, features and scenarios will be written in this language regardless of the app's URL structure.

repo.section_subtitle: The source code AI will analyze and the business rules QA wants to cover.
repo.repo_url_hint: Accepts https, SSH (git@github.com:...) or the owner/repo shorthand.

zip.label: ZIP upload
zip.hint: Alternative to git clone. Useful for private repos: download the .zip from GitHub (Code > Download ZIP) and upload here. Replaces the URL above. Limit: 100 MB.

repo.business_context_placeholder: Describe use cases and business rules QA wants to cover. E.g.: 'When the user tries to register with an existing CPF, the API returns 409 and the UI shows a generic toast'.
repo.business_context_hint: This text is sent together with the code to Claude Code on each analysis.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Deleting the project removes scenarios, crawls, pages and screenshots. This action is irreversible.
danger.confirm_description: You are about to delete "{name}" and everything in it. This cannot be undone.

ai.title: AI
ai.subtitle: Configure the AI provider used to generate scenarios and tests for every project in this organization.
ai.provider_hint: Ollama and Anthropic have dedicated options. LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM, OpenRouter and OpenAI use the OpenAI-compatible option.
ai.base_url_hint: Examples: http://ollama:11434 (Ollama in Docker), http://host.docker.internal:1234 (LM Studio on host), https://api.openai.com
ai.model_hint: The exact model identifier served by the provider. Use "Test connection" to pull the list of available models.
ai.api_key_hint: Only required when the provider asks for it (OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq). Stored encrypted.
ai.api_key_saved: An API key is saved. Leave blank to keep it. Check "remove key" to delete it.
ai.temperature_hint: 0 makes the output deterministic; higher values increase creativity. Recommended: 0.2 – 0.4.
ai.num_ctx_hint: Maximum tokens the model can reason over. Match the model's native limit. Applies only to Ollama.
ai.timeout_hint: Generation timeout in milliseconds. Increase for larger models.

errors.forbidden: Only owners and admins can change the AI configuration.
errors.rate_limited: Too many changes in a short time. Try again later.

anthropic_section.title: Code analysis (Claude Code)
anthropic_section.subtitle: Source-code analysis uses the Claude Code CLI. Choose between pasting an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (token-based billing) or an OAuth token from your Pro/Max subscription (higher limits, internal use).
anthropic_section.required_warning: Without an Anthropic credential (here or in the main provider), the Code tab in code-first projects stays disabled.
anthropic_section.reuse_hint: Your main provider is already Anthropic. the same key will be reused unless you provide a different one below.
anthropic_section.auth_mode_api_key_desc: Pay-as-you-go Anthropic account. Token-based cost, rate limit per tier (10k–400k TPM).
anthropic_section.auth_mode_oauth_desc: Token from your Pro or Max subscription. Much higher limits, no token cost within the quota.
anthropic_section.oauth_setup_title: How to generate the OAuth token
anthropic_section.oauth_setup_desc: On your machine, with Claude Code CLI installed and logged into your Pro/Max account, run the command above. The CLI returns a token starting with sk-ant-oat01-... (valid for 90 days). Paste it in the field below.
anthropic_section.oauth_token_hint: Paste the token returned by `claude setup-token` (starts with sk-ant-oat01-...). Stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) and expires in ~90 days. regenerate when needed.
anthropic_section.oauth_test_saved: Format OK (token saved). OAuth tokens can only be really validated on the first analysis. Anthropic does not expose a REST endpoint to test OAuth. If the analysis fails with 401, regenerate the token.
anthropic_section.oauth_test_format_ok: Format OK (sk-ant-oat prefix recognized). Real validation happens on the first codex job. OAuth tokens can't be tested via direct REST.
anthropic_section.oauth_test_format_bad: Unexpected format. OAuth tokens start with 'sk-ant-oat' and have ~90 characters. If you pasted an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY by mistake, switch the mode to "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY".
anthropic_section.oauth_test_missing: Paste the token in the field above before testing.
anthropic_section.api_key_hint: Paste your Anthropic account key (starts with sk-ant-api...). Stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM).
anthropic_section.api_key_saved: An Anthropic credential is saved. Leave blank to keep it. Check "remove" to erase it.
anthropic_section.api_key_reused: No dedicated credential. the codex uses the main provider's key (API key mode).
anthropic_section.model_hint: Full model identifier (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 or claude-haiku-4-5). Leave empty to use the container default.
anthropic_section.model_hint_dynamic: {count} model(s) available on your account. Click the field for suggestions or type freely.
anthropic_section.model_hint_oauth: OAuth tokens (Pro/Max) can't list models via REST. type the identifier manually. E.g.: claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929.
anthropic_section.model_hint_no_credential: Save an Anthropic credential above to list available models automatically.

providers_section.title: Additional provider (optional)
providers_section.subtitle: Configure an alternative provider here (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible, or Anthropic) used by crawler-based analysis and other legacy flows. You can leave it blank if you only use source-code analysis.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your name and preferred language.
profile.locale_hint: The page reloads in the new language after saving.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Protect your account with MFA, change your password, and manage active sessions.

mfa.section_subtitle: Add an extra layer of protection at sign-in.
mfa.title: MFA (TOTP)
mfa.enabled_desc: Your account is protected by an authenticator app.
mfa.disabled_desc: MFA is off. We recommend enabling it for better security.
mfa.disable_confirm_description: To confirm, enter your current password. Two-factor protection will be removed.

password.section_subtitle: Change your password. Other sessions are revoked automatically.

sessions.section_subtitle: Devices currently connected to your account.

dashboard.subtitle: Your k-veritas foundation is ready.
dashboard.placeholder_body: Coming soon: Playwright test editor with LLM assistant.
